summary: IP Auto-Ban System Testing Complete - All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified with all components working correctly. IP blocking, unblocking, configuration, whitelist protection, and Security Audit tab UI all functioning as expected.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/security/blocked-ips returns active and history arrays
POST /api/security/block-ip blocks an IP and returns ok
POST /api/security/block-ip requires IP address (returns 400 if missing)
POST /api/security/unblock-ip unblocks an IP and returns ok
POST /api/security/unblock-ip requires IP address (returns 400 if missing)
GET /api/security/ip-block-config returns default config with whitelist
Login still works correctly after adding IP block middleware
frontend_ui_tests: Security Audit tab loads with data-testid='security-audit-tab'
IP Bloccati stat card displays correctly
Blocca IP button (manual-block-btn) present and clickable
Blocca IP dialog opens with IP input, reason, duration, permanent checkbox
Config dialog opens with all configuration fields (max_attempts, window_minutes, block_duration_hours, whitelist)
IP Sospetti section shows suspicious IPs with Blocca buttons
Storico Blocchi IP section shows block history when history exists

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ip_blocking.py (new test file for IP Auto-Ban system)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing admin and operator accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: IP Auto-Ban System fully verified. Backend endpoints: GET /api/security/blocked-ips (returns active/history), POST /api/security/block-ip (blocks IP), POST /api/security/unblock-ip (unblocks IP), GET /api/security/ip-block-config (returns config with whitelist), POST /api/security/ip-block-config (saves config). All endpoints require admin role (non-admin gets 403). Whitelist IPs cannot be blocked (400 error). IPBlockMiddleware checks every request against blocked_ips collection. Auto-ban triggers after 10 failed login attempts in 30 min window (configurable). Frontend SecurityAuditTab shows IP Bloccati stat, Blocca IP button, Config button, IP Sospetti section with Blocca buttons, and Storico Blocchi IP history. 127.0.0.1 is in whitelist for testing.

feature_verification.feature: IP Auto-Ban System with manual block/unblock, configurable thresholds, IP whitelist, blocking middleware, and full UI management

verification_results.blocked_ips_endpoint: GET /api/security/blocked-ips returns active and history arrays - VERIFIED

verification_results.security_dashboard_stat: blocked_ips stat included in security dashboard - VERIFIED
verification_results.login_after_middleware: Login still works correctly after IP block middleware - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_ip_bloccati_stat: IP Bloccati stat card displays in Security Audit tab - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_blocca_ip_dialog: Blocca IP dialog opens with all fields (IP, reason, duration, permanent) - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_config_dialog: Config dialog shows all settings (enabled, auto_ban, max_attempts, window, duration, whitelist) - VERIFIED
